/usr/bin/cc -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/dev-libs/libcolumbus/src=/usr/src/debug/libcolumbus -flto=auto -Wall -pedantic -Wextra -fvisibility=hidden -std=c99 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/capi.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/capi.dir/CAPITest.c.o -o capi  -Wl,-rpath,/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/dev-libs/libcolumbus/src/build/src ../src/libcolumbus.so.1.1.0 -licuuc
